Advanced Usage

esqLABS

2026-04-20

Source: vignettes/advanced-usage.Rmd
advanced-usage.Rmd

Context Menu

The table includes a built-in right-click context menu:

  • Add row above
  • Add row below
  • Remove row

Tracking Row Changes 

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  row_count <- reactiveVal(5)  # Initial rows

  observeEvent(input$my_table_edited, {
    data <- jsonlite::fromJSON(input$my_table_edited)
    new_count <- nrow(data)

    if (new_count > row_count()) {
      showNotification("Row added")
    } else if (new_count < row_count()) {
      showNotification("Row removed")
    }

    row_count(new_count)
  })
}

Data Validation

Custom Validation 

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  observeEvent(input$my_table_edited, {
    data <- jsonlite::fromJSON(input$my_table_edited)

    errors <- validate_data(data)

    if (length(errors) > 0) {
      showNotification(
        paste("Errors:", paste(errors, collapse = ", ")),
        type = "warning"
      )
    }
  })

  validate_data <- function(data) {
    errors <- character()

    if (any(is.na(data$name) | data$name == "")) {
      errors <- c(errors, "Name required")
    }

    if (any(data$quantity < 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
      errors <- c(errors, "Quantity must be >= 0")
    }

    return(errors)
  }
}

Export Data

CSV Download 

ui <- fluidPage(
  esq_tableInput("data_table", ...),
  downloadButton("download", "Download CSV")
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  table_data <- reactiveVal(initial_data)

  observeEvent(input$data_table_edited, {
    table_data(jsonlite::fromJSON(input$data_table_edited))
  })

  output$download <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() {
      paste0("data_", Sys.Date(), ".csv")
    },
    content = function(file) {
      write.csv(table_data(), file, row.names = FALSE)
    }
  )
}

JSON Download 

output$download_json <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() {
    paste0("data_", Sys.Date(), ".json")
  },
  content = function(file) {
    jsonlite::write_json(table_data(), file, pretty = TRUE)
  }
)

Auto-Save Pattern 

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  auto_save <- debounce(reactive(input$my_table_edited), 2000)

  observe({
    data_json <- auto_save()
    req(data_json)

    data <- jsonlite::fromJSON(data_json)
    saveRDS(data, "auto_save.rds")

    showNotification("Auto-saved", duration = 1)
  })
}

Integration with plotly 

library(plotly)

ui <- fluidPage(
  fluidRow(
    column(6, esq_tableInput("data", ...)),
    column(6, plotlyOutput("chart"))
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  table_data <- reactive({
    if (!is.null(input$data_edited)) {
      jsonlite::fromJSON(input$data_edited)
    } else {
      initial_data
    }
  })

  output$chart <- renderPlotly({
    plot_ly(table_data(), x = ~category, y = ~value, type = "bar")
  })
}

Custom CSS Styling 

ui <- fluidPage(
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML("
      /* Header styling */
      .esq-handsontable th {
        background: #f5f5f5;
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      /* Read-only cells */
      .esq-handsontable td.htDimmed {
        background: #fafafa;
        color: #999;
      }

      /* Invalid cells */
      .esq-handsontable td.htInvalid {
        background: #ffebee !important;
      }
    "))
  ),
  esq_tableInput("styled_table", ...)
)

Keyboard Shortcuts

Built-in Handsontable shortcuts:

Shortcut Action
Arrow keys Navigate cells
Enter Edit / Move down
Tab Move right
Shift+Tab Move left
Ctrl+C Copy
Ctrl+V Paste
Ctrl+Z Undo
Ctrl+Y Redo
Delete Clear cell
Escape Cancel editing

Error Handling 

observeEvent(input$my_table_edited, {
  data <- tryCatch({
    jsonlite::fromJSON(input$my_table_edited)
  }, error = function(e) {
    showNotification("Error parsing data", type = "error")
    return(NULL)
  })

  if (is.null(data)) return()

  # Process data...
})

Troubleshooting

Table not rendering? - Check package installation - Verify data frame structure

Dropdowns empty? - Ensure source is a character vector - Check for typos in column names

Updates not working? - Verify inputId matches - Check session is passed correctly

Performance issues? - Reduce row count (use pagination) - Use simpler column types - Minimize columns

On this page

Developed by Anastasia Kostiv.
